testcase.name: OHRM003Test

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //h6[normalize-space()='Reset Password link sent successfully']' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
